positive: A minimalist, stylized mountain range silhouette against a vibrant sunset sky. The mountains are rendered in deep indigo and charcoal tones, creating a powerful contrast with the warm gradient sky (orange, yellow, rose). Include stylized, geometric flora (cacti, desert blooms) and abstract celestial elements (crescents, stars) integrated into the composition. The overall aesthetic should be modern, clean, graphic novel meets Nordic folk art. Perfect central composition, vector-style print quality, sharp edges, deep saturation, high contrast, isolated elements on a clear background.
negative: blur, watermark, text, logo, signature, artifact, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, messy background, grainy, muted, photorealistic
